entities.name: WEST AFRICAN SAHEL
entities.description: A semi-arid region in West Africa characterized by harsh environmental conditions and land degradation.

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of soil to provide essential nutrients for plant growth.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL LAND REHABILITATION
entities.description: The process of restoring the productivity and health of degraded agricultural soils.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE PRODUCTION PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural methods designed to maintain productivity while preserving environmental health.

entities.name: HARSH ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: Difficult climatic and environmental factors present in the Sahel region.

entities.name: SOIL REGENERATION
entities.description: The process of renewing soil nutrients and structure to restore productivity.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: General techniques and methods applied in farming systems.

entities.name: SOIL AMELIORATING PRACTICES
entities.description: Specific agricultural interventions aimed at improving soil quality and fertility.

entities.name: CONSERVATION PRACTICES
entities.description: Methods used to protect soil and water resources from degradation.

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of soil quality and the loss of biological or economic productivity.

entities.name: CHEMICAL FERTILIZER
entities.description: The application of synthetic nutrient-rich substances to soil.

entities.name: ORGANIC AMENDMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: The application of organic materials to improve soil structure and fertility.

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: Practices aimed at reducing soil erosion and optimizing water use.

entities.name: CROP DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of growing multiple crop species to enhance soil health and resilience.

entities.name: AGROFORESTRY
entities.description: The integration of trees and shrubs into crop and livestock farming systems.

entities.name: BIOPHYSICAL LIMITATIONS
entities.description: Natural physical and biological constraints that hinder agricultural production.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURAL MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The long-term planning and implementation of farming practices to ensure environmental and economic viability.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing crops and livestock for food and economic gain.
